personalInfo.personalStatement: Accomplished corporate attorney with 14+ years of experience in mergers & acquisitions, corporate governance, and commercial litigation.

workExperience.description: Lead M&A transactions valued between $50M–$500M across technology and healthcare sectors; Advise C-suite executives and boards on corporate governance and compliance matters; Manage team of 8 associates and paralegals on complex multi-jurisdictional deals; Successfully negotiated and closed 35+ acquisition agreements with favorable terms

Represented clients in commercial litigation cases with settlements exceeding $120M; Drafted and negotiated commercial contracts, licensing agreements, and joint ventures; Conducted legal due diligence for private equity transactions and IPO preparations; Provided regulatory compliance counsel for publicly traded companies

Assisted in preparation of securities filings and regulatory compliance documentation; Researched complex legal issues and prepared memoranda for senior partners; Represented clients in arbitration and mediation proceedings; Managed document discovery process for major litigation cases

education.description:
GPA: 3.7/4.0
Relevant coursework: Algorithms, Database Systems, Machine Learning, Distributed Systems

certificationsAndAwards.organization: State Bar Association - Corporate Law Section
